name: Chocolate Chip Brownies
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Taste of Home Aug/Sept 95
In a mixing bowl, cream butter and sugar until smooth. Add eggs and vanilla extract; mix well.
Combine flour, cocoa powder, and baking powder in a separate bowl. Stir into the creamed mixture just until blended (do not overmix). Pour batter into a greased jellyroll pan (15x10x1 inches). Sprinkle with chocolate chips and nuts.
Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 30-35 minutes.
